text:
is the third official guidebook for the Attack on Titan manga, written by Hajime Isayama. It was released in Japan on August 9, 2016.

Contents

The guidebook includes interviews with manga author Hajime Isayama, as well as maps, sets of "Current Publicly Available Information," "IF illustrations," popular content from the au SmartPass mobile app, and paper crafts of the Armored and Female Titans.
